title: ステイヤーズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Stayers Stakes, Mejiro Bright
doesn't seem nervous at all. In fact, she looks
happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She explains it's been her dream since she was
little to run in a long race, like the spring Tenno
Sho, and accomplish something for the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, the head of the Mejiro household
arrives and takes a seat in the stands to watch the
race.
